name: Bug report
about: Something in the framework misbehaves (a hook, a skill pipeline, the Canvas client, a script)
title: "[bug] "
labels: bug

> ⚠️ **Never paste course IDs, school names, instructor names, emails, cookies,
> JWTs, Canvas URLs, or real drafts into a public issue.** Strip them first —
> replace with `<course_id>`, `<school>`, etc. Private data belongs in your
> local gitignored config, never here.

A clear description of the bug.
